description:
This dashboard provides a **high-level** overview of your TiDB clusters.

Further reading on TiDB monitoring:

- [TiDB Monitoring Framework Overview](https://docs.pingcap.com/tidb/stable/tidb-monitoring-framework)

- [TiDB Troubleshooting Map](https://docs.pingcap.com/tidb/stable/tidb-troubleshooting-map)

- [Key Metrics](https://docs.pingcap.com/tidb/stable/grafana-overview-dashboard)

Clone this template dashboard to make changes and add your own graph widgets.
title: TiDB Cluster Overview
